expected_workflow: Agent introduces itself and asks if patient is ready
Agent explains Bluetooth check and calls check_connect
Agent explains device pairing and calls pair_device
Agent explains ECG recording step and calls recording_request
Agent asks patient to remain still
Patient reports Bluetooth disconnected during recording
Agent acknowledges issue and asks patient to check device
Agent calls check_record_ECG_correctly - returns 'ECG record saved successfully'
Agent calls finish_recording and provides completion summary

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Hello! I'm MediECG-Agent, your medical assistant. I'm here to help you record an ECG using your Bluetooth ECG sensor.

Are you ready to begin?

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Yes, I'm ready.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great! Let's begin.

**Step 1 — Bluetooth Check**

I'm now going to check if your Bluetooth is enabled on your device.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully check

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your Bluetooth is enabled and working properly.

**Step 2 — Device Pairing**

Now I will check if your ECG device is paired with your device.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Pairing request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! The pairing request was sent successfully. Please check your device and confirm when the ECG sensor is paired and connected.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Device paired successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your ECG device is now paired successfully.

**Step 3 — ECG Recording**

Now I will start a 60-second ECG recording. Please remain as still as possible during this time.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Great! The recording request has been sent successfully. Please remain still for the full 60 seconds.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Bluetooth disconnected! Recording stopped.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
I see there was an issue with the recording. The Bluetooth connection was lost during the recording, which caused it to stop.

**What we need to do:**

1. Please check if your ECG device is still powered on
2. Make sure the device is within range of your phone
3. Try reconnecting the Bluetooth connection

Please check the device and let me know when it's reconnected and you're ready to try again.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Okay, I turned the device back on and it's connected again. I'm ready to try again.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great! Let's try again.

**Step 3 — ECG Recording (Retry)**

I will now start another 60-second ECG recording. Please remain still during this time.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Perfect! The recording has started. Please remain still for the full 60 seconds.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: ECG recording completed

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Excellent! Thank you for staying still during the recording.

**Step 4 — Check Database Integrity**

Now I will check if your ECG recording was saved correctly.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: ECG record saved successfully.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your ECG recording has been successfully saved and validated.

**Step 5 — Finish**

Now I'll complete the recording process.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully notify

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
**Recording Complete!**

Your ECG recording is now complete and all your clinical data has been saved successfully. Thank you for reconnecting the device and trying again.
